editorsNote: This was a week for smaller proofs of coherence. Barca did not solve everything. It did look more structurally honest, which is usually the first useful step.

items.headline: Barca's Rest Defense Is Learning to Breathe
items.summary: A tactical read on how the side is leaving a calmer, more survivable shape behind the ball.

items.headline: Match notebook follow-up pending
items.summary: The desk is tracking whether the calmer rest-defense posture also sharpens the next weak-side release.

items.headline: Archive context held for later packaging
items.summary: The archive slot stays reserved, but no extra story is promoted until the next issue package.

items.headline: Nine clean first recoveries after turnovers
items.summary: The defensive structure is finally surviving the first broken phase.

notes: Distribution handoff remains deferred to the future queue contract.
